name: AI-Powered Notes with RAG
summary: Note AI is an intelligent note-taking application powered by AI.
It lets users create and manage notes, then ask questions about them using RAG with OpenAI.

name: Book Review Platform
summary: A full-stack web application where users can browse books and write reviews.
It also provides AI-enriched insights such as summary, sentiment, and tags using Mastra AI.

name: Ticketing App
summary: A microservices-based ticketing system inspired by real-world event-ticketing platforms.
It demonstrates event-driven architecture, asynchronous communication, and service isolation.

name: Recipe Shop
summary: Recipe Shop lets users manage shopping ingredients manually or import them from recipes.
This project is now deprecated but still useful as an earlier Angular and Firebase reference.
